input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.2.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.2.5
            TITLE: scatter shields may be composed of multiple pieces.  any gaps must be small (< 3 mm)

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.2.5: Scatter shields may be composed of multiple pieces.  Any gaps must be small (< 3 mm)
T.5.2.5 Scatter shields may be composed of multiple pieces.  Any gaps must be small (< 3 mm)

final_answer: Scatter shields may be composed of multiple pieces. Any gaps must be small (< 3 mm)
